diff.carve_out_reason: 585 lines > 200 line limit triggers required parallel dispatch; however 7 of 8 files are prose/example .md/.txt with no executable code and 1 Python test file scoring is narrow (no production code introduced)

scope_ph01.note: Single-purpose: WP-005 Ask-phase prose. The journal file is bookkeeping; the skills/_prompts/ files are the deliverable; the test file is the contract that pins them. One concern.

size_ph02.note: 501-1000 line band; 6-15 file band. Mitigation: 5 of 8 files are prose/example text (low risk per byte). One Python test file (252 lines) is the only executable surface.

safety_ph03.note: Zero migrations, zero schema/IDL files, zero infra (Docker/k8s/CI workflow) files, zero secret patterns. No CR-06 auto-downgrade triggered.

completeness_ph04.note: All new prose files have a test file (test_discover_project_prompts.py) that pins their structural invariants. The test file itself is its own contract — no test-for-the-test required.

SEC-01 access control (no auth surface added)
DAT-03 PII in logs (test never logs)
